content_en: "I urge you to adhere to my Sunnah and the way of the Rightly Guided Caliphs who come after me; hold fast to it and cling to it strongly."12 The relevant point in this hadith with regard to the validity of 'Ali's caliphate is that he was one of the Rightly Guided Caliphs who enjoined what is good and forbade what is evil, adhered to the limits set by AUah (B), established regular prayer, paid z&& and followed the way of the Messenger of Allah (&) in justice and establishing truth.
